mapper.select: SELECT pr.id, pr.product_code, pr.manufacturer_code, pr.quantity, pr.unit_price, pr.total_amount, pr.status, pr.create_time, pr.update_time, p.product_name, m.manufacturer_name FROM purchase_record pr LEFT JOIN product p ON pr.product_code = p.product_code LEFT JOIN manufacturer m ON pr.manufacturer_code = m.manufacturer_code ORDER BY pr.create_time DESC

SELECT pr.id, pr.product_code, pr.manufacturer_code, pr.quantity, pr.unit_price, pr.total_amount, pr.status, pr.create_time, pr.update_time, p.product_name, m.manufacturer_name FROM purchase_record pr LEFT JOIN product p ON pr.product_code = p.product_code LEFT JOIN manufacturer m ON pr.manufacturer_code = m.manufacturer_code WHERE pr.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_record (product_code, manufacturer_code, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, status) VALUES (#{productCode}, #{manufacturerCode}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_record SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
